pointerScrollFactor.name: Pointer Scroll Factor
pointerScrollFactor.description: Scaling factor applied to continuous scroll axis deltas generated by pointer devices such as mice and trackballs. A value of 1.0 means no change; values greater than 1.0 amplify scrolling speed; values between 0 and 1.0 reduce scrolling speed. This factor does not affect discrete scroll button events.
pointerScrollFactor.description[zh_CN]: 应用于鼠标、轨迹球等指针设备连续滚动轴增量的缩放因子。1.0 表示不改变；大于 1.0 加快滚动速度；0 到 1.0 之间减慢滚动速度。此因子不影响离散滚动按钮事件。

pointerHandMode.name: Pointer Hand Mode
pointerHandMode.description: Configures the primary button mapping for pointer devices. "Right" means the left physical button is the primary button (default for right-handed users); "Left" means the right physical button is the primary button (for left-handed users).
pointerHandMode.description[zh_CN]: 配置指针设备的主按钮映射。"Right" 表示左侧物理按键为主按钮（右撇子默认）；"Left" 表示右侧物理按键为主按钮（左撇子适用）。

mouseAccelSpeed.name: Mouse Acceleration Speed
mouseAccelSpeed.description: Controls the cursor acceleration sensitivity for mice. The valid range is -1.0 to 1.0, where 0.0 is the neutral default meaning no acceleration adjustment. Negative values reduce acceleration (cursor moves more slowly at higher speeds), positive values increase acceleration (cursor moves faster at higher speeds).
mouseAccelSpeed.description[zh_CN]: 控制鼠标光标加速灵敏度。有效范围为 -1.0 到 1.0，0.0 为默认中性值，表示不做加速调整。负值降低加速（高速移动时光标变慢），正值增加加速（高速移动时光标变快）。

mouseAccelerationProfile.name: Mouse Acceleration Profile
mouseAccelerationProfile.description: Mouse acceleration profile, corresponding to libinput acceleration profiles. Valid values: 0 (None, use device default), 1 (Flat, cursor speed is directly proportional to physical movement with no acceleration), 2 (Adaptive, acceleration increases with cursor speed, this is the libinput default), 4 (Custom).
mouseAccelerationProfile.description[zh_CN]: 鼠标加速配置，对应 libinput 加速配置文件。可选值：0（None，使用设备默认值）、1（Flat，光标速度与物理移动成正比，无加速）、2（Adaptive，加速随光标速度递增，为 libinput 默认值）、4（Custom，自定义）。

mouseNaturalScroll.name: Mouse Natural Scroll
mouseNaturalScroll.description: Whether natural scrolling is enabled for mice. When enabled, scrolling content moves in the same direction as the finger movement on the mouse wheel (e.g., scrolling down moves the content downward). When disabled, the traditional behavior is used (scrolling down moves the viewport upward).
mouseNaturalScroll.description[zh_CN]: 是否为鼠标启用自然滚动。启用后，内容滚动方向与鼠标滚轮拨动方向一致（例如向下拨动滚轮时内容向下移动）。禁用时使用传统行为（向下拨动滚轮时视口向上移动）。

touchpadAccelSpeed.name: Touchpad Acceleration Speed
touchpadAccelSpeed.description: Controls the cursor acceleration sensitivity for touchpads. The valid range is -1.0 to 1.0, where 0.0 is the neutral default meaning no acceleration adjustment. Negative values reduce acceleration (cursor moves more slowly at higher speeds), positive values increase acceleration (cursor moves faster at higher speeds).
touchpadAccelSpeed.description[zh_CN]: 控制触控板光标加速灵敏度。有效范围为 -1.0 到 1.0，0.0 为默认中性值，表示不做加速调整。负值降低加速（高速移动时光标变慢），正值增加加速（高速移动时光标变快）。

touchpadAccelerationProfile.name: Touchpad Acceleration Profile
touchpadAccelerationProfile.description: Touchpad acceleration profile, corresponding to libinput acceleration profiles. Valid values: 0 (None, use device default), 1 (Flat, cursor speed is directly proportional to physical movement with no acceleration), 2 (Adaptive, acceleration increases with cursor speed, this is the libinput default), 4 (Custom).
touchpadAccelerationProfile.description[zh_CN]: 触控板加速配置，对应 libinput 加速配置文件。可选值：0（None，使用设备默认值）、1（Flat，光标速度与物理移动成正比，无加速）、2（Adaptive，加速随光标速度递增，为 libinput 默认值）、4（Custom，自定义）。

touchpadDisableWhileTyping.name: Touchpad Disable While Typing
touchpadDisableWhileTyping.description: When enabled, the touchpad is temporarily disabled while keyboard input is detected to prevent accidental cursor movement or clicks caused by palm contact during typing.
touchpadDisableWhileTyping.description[zh_CN]: 启用后，在检测到键盘输入时将暂时禁用触控板，以防止打字时因手掌接触触控板而导致意外光标移动或点击。

touchpadTapToClick.name: Touchpad Tap To Click
touchpadTapToClick.description: When enabled, a tap or short touch on the touchpad surface is treated as a left button click, allowing users to click without pressing the physical touchpad button.
touchpadTapToClick.description[zh_CN]: 启用后，在触控板表面轻触或短按会被视为左键点击，允许用户无需按下物理按键即可完成点击操作。

touchpadNaturalScroll.name: Touchpad Natural Scroll
touchpadNaturalScroll.description: Whether natural scrolling is enabled for touchpads. When enabled, scrolling content moves in the same direction as the finger movement on the touchpad surface (e.g., swiping up moves the content upward). When disabled, the traditional behavior is used (swiping up moves the viewport downward).
touchpadNaturalScroll.description[zh_CN]: 是否为触控板启用自然滚动。启用后，内容滚动方向与触控板表面手指滑动方向一致（例如向上滑动时内容向上移动）。禁用时使用传统行为（向上滑动时视口向下移动）。

touchpadSendEventsMode.name: Touchpad Send Events Mode
touchpadSendEventsMode.description: Controls whether the touchpad sends input events. Valid values: 0 (Enabled, touchpad sends events normally), 1 (Disabled, touchpad is completely disabled and will not send any events), 2 (DisabledOnExternalMouse, touchpad is disabled only when an external mouse is connected). Corresponds to libinput send events modes.
touchpadSendEventsMode.description[zh_CN]: 控制触控板是否发送输入事件。可选值：0（Enabled，触控板正常发送事件）、1（Disabled，触控板完全禁用，不发送任何事件）、2（DisabledOnExternalMouse，仅在连接外部鼠标时禁用触控板）。对应 libinput 的事件发送模式。

keyboardRate.name: Keyboard Repeat Rate
keyboardRate.description: Key repeat rate in characters per second when a key is held down. Higher values result in faster key repeat. The typical valid range is 2 to 1000. A value of 0 effectively disables key repeat.
keyboardRate.description[zh_CN]: 按住按键时每秒重复输入的字符数。值越大重复越快。有效范围通常为 2 到 1000。设为 0 时实际等同于禁用按键重复。

keyboardDelay.name: Keyboard Repeat Delay
keyboardDelay.description: Delay in milliseconds before a held key begins to repeat. Lower values result in a shorter wait before key repeat starts. The typical valid range is 0 to 1000 milliseconds.
keyboardDelay.description[zh_CN]: 按住按键后开始重复输入前的等待时间（以毫秒为单位）。值越低等待时间越短。有效范围通常为 0 到 1000 毫秒。
